key_finding: V→final|nums REPLICATES on Phi-3.5-mini (R=0.191, p<0.001 at L24). V→final|embed=0.169 (p<0.001). WRRA 87.5% (14/16, p=0.002) — STRONGEST across all models. Forward-looking V signal now confirmed on 2/3 model families (Qwen + Phi). Mistral failure likely accuracy-mediated (43% vs 83%). Phase 2 evidence revised from WEAK-MODERATE to MODERATE.
evidence_impact: Cross-model replication achieved. Forward-looking V signal is NOT Qwen-specific. Phase 2 evidence substantially strengthened.
next_planned: Accuracy-matched Qwen subsample test (subsample to 43% accuracy, see if V|nums disappears). Or Llama access. Or paraphrase disruption for converging behavioral evidence.

null_space_existence.status: CONFIRMED in K-space (p=0.013). Narrow but real. Qwen-specific.

spatial_structure.status: DECISIVELY DISCONFIRMED for selectivity. HEAD-LEVEL CONCENTRATION decisive on Qwen, weak on Llama.

positional_dissociation.status: Complete. Head x position interaction is encoding-dependent.

geometric_dissociation.status: K > V UNIVERSAL: 8 angles. K spectral geometry uniform across heads. V spectral differentiates.

head_level_analysis.status: COMPLETE + SPECTRAL: Two-regime on Qwen (decisive), near-collapse on Llama.

natural_usage.status: MODERATE (revised UP): V→final|nums confirmed on 2 families: Qwen (R=0.24, p<0.001) AND Phi (R=0.19, p<0.001). NOT on Mistral (R=0.06, ns — accuracy confound). WRRA 87.5% on Phi (p=0.002), 71.4% on Qwen (p=0.039). V>K for forward-looking (3 models).

cross_model_replication.status: COMPLETE for Phase 1 (4 families). Phase 2: V|nums on 2 families (Qwen, Phi). WRRA on 2 families (Qwen, Phi). Raw V→final on 3 families.
